title: feat: add `--image-parallel-copies` flag
body:
It would be useful when there are many layers while most of layers are unchanged between versions.

See discussion at https://github.com/nlewo/nix2container/pull/125

comments.body:
> Does [containers/image#1968](https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1968) change the need for this flag?

Both PRs can speed up `skopeo copy`. It's better to have both.

@Atry Looks like this needs a rebase.
Changes LGTM on a quick scan.
